summary: Phase J4 Journey page features tested. All J4 features verified: Compare button, Archive AlertDialog, AI premium gating (lock icon + upgrade CTA), School Intel hidden for basic tier, Overdue Follow-up card. Email toast shows for basic tier in FAB but bypassed in Overdue card (minor bug). J1-J3 regression tests pass.

ui_bugs.issue: Send Email button (data-testid='overdue-email-btn') bypasses subscription gating - opens EmailComposer directly instead of showing upgrade toast for basic tier
ui_bugs.fix_location: JourneyPage.js line 455 - should use openGatedEmail() instead of setShowEmail(true)

action_items: Fix overdue-email-btn to use openGatedEmail() for subscription gating consistency
critical_code_review_comments: Subscription gating inconsistency: FAB Email uses openGatedEmail() correctly, but Overdue card's Send Email button directly sets setShowEmail(true) bypassing the check
Compare button navigates correctly but /compare route may 404 (expected per requirements)
Coach Watch Alert remains MOCKED as 'Staff Stable'
School social links data is null for current programs (expected - no data yet)

success_rate.frontend: 95% - 11 of 12 features pass (1 minor subscription gating bug)

context_for_next_testing_agent: J4 adds: (1) Compare button in header links to /compare?selected={programId}. (2) Archive uses AlertDialog confirmation. (3) AI section shows PREMIUM badge + lock icon + 'Upgrade to Premium' button for non-premium users. (4) School Intelligence link hidden for basic tier. (5) Email gating - FAB shows upgrade toast for basic tier. The actual route is /pipeline/{programId} not /journey/{programId}. Minor bug: overdue card's Send Email bypasses subscription check.

j4_features.compare_button: PASS - data-testid='compare-btn' found, visible on desktop, links to /compare?selected={programId}
j4_features.archive_alertdialog: PASS - data-testid='archive-btn' triggers AlertDialog with data-testid='confirm-archive-btn'
j4_features.ai_premium_gating: PASS - data-testid='ai-premium-teaser' shows lock icon and 'Upgrade to Premium' button (data-testid='ai-upgrade-btn')
j4_features.school_intel_hidden: PASS - data-testid='school-intel-link' not in DOM for basic tier
j4_features.overdue_followup_card: PASS - data-testid='overdue-followup-card' displays correctly for Stanford
j4_features.fab_email_toast: PASS - data-testid='fab-email' shows upgrade toast 'Email integration is available on Pro and Premium plans'

j1_j3_regression.match_score_badge: PASS - data-testid='journey-match-score' shows 64% Match (Stanford) and 70% Match (BYU)
j1_j3_regression.risk_badges: PASS - data-testid='journey-risk-badges' with Roster Tight, Timeline Awareness
